scope_findings.issue: Unsafe type shortcut (`null as unknown as number`) violates NON_GOALS 'No unsafe type shortcuts' and VALIDATION 'type-safe' — a quality smell that is also a contract/scope violation. Demonstrates the canon §2.1 scope/quality correlation (verified against live seconder 2026-05-31).

quality_findings.issue: Returns null through an unsafe cast from a number function, violating type safety.
